case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, BY AND THROUGH VS. RAMIREZ DEVELOPERS, INC. DBA PACIFIC CEMENT et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, BY AND THROUGH ITS MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ DEVELOPERS, INC. DBA PACIFIC CEMENT COMPANY,LLC DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RAMIREZ DEVELOPERS, INC.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON STIPULATION, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, BY AND THROUGH ITS MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY
ORDER DIRECTING CLERK TO ENTER JUDGMENT ON STIPULATION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, BY AND THROUGH ITS MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ DEVELOPERS, INC. DBA PACIFIC CEMENT COMPANY,LLC RAMIREZ DEVELOPERS, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PIER 80 PROPERTY, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $84,170.20 RENT, $7,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $91,670.20, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT
